creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rene
Date: Fri Jan 18 20:36:52 2013
New Revision: 40679
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/40679

Log:
  Add Argeweb Hosting.
  
  PR:		www/175204
  Submitted by:	Tom van Leeuwen <tom@argeweb.nl>
  Approved by:	gjb (mentor)

Modified:
  head/share/xml/commercial.isp.xml

Modified: head/share/xml/commercial.isp.xml
==============================================================================
--- head/share/xml/commercial.isp.xml	Fri Jan 18 20:34:17 2013	(r40678)
+++ head/share/xml/commercial.isp.xml	Fri Jan 18 20:36:52 2013	(r40679)
@@ -8,6 +8,16 @@
       $FreeBSD$
     </cvs:keyword>
 
+  <entry id="argeweb">
+    <name>Argeweb Hosting</name>
+    <url>http://www.argeweb.nl</url>
+    <description>
+      Argeweb is one of the largest hosting providers in the Netherlands.
+      Most of our shared hosting platforms are running on servers powered
+      by FreeBSD for years.
+    </description>
+  </entry>
+
   <entry id="astute">
     <name>Astute Hosting Incorporated</name>
     <url>http://www.astutehosting.com</url>
